free_text: Measurement of fission product yields in the
Natural 238U metal foil (1.0 cm2 in area, 344.1 to
634.2 mg/cm2 thick) wrapped Al foil (0.025 mm thick,
Detector coupled to a 4K channel analyzer
T1/2=53.08 hr in the article is typo and should read
23.4 hr which was used in yield calculation.
Over all systematic error (~3.8%) due to:
Compiled by Saumyajit Biswas and Nabendu Ku
Charge of the products that were used to derive
the chain yields from the cumulative yields.
Subtraction of the light and heavy fragment masses
